hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented identity provider data into a unified compliance workflow that supports onboarding, case management, and audit-ready evidence for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle when identity verification outputs remain siloed across multiple providers. This fragmentation causes slower onboarding, inconsistent case context, and gaps in the audit-ready evidence necessary for clear regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates and standardizes identity verification data from multiple providers to create a unified compliance workflow that accelerates onboarding and preserves audit-ready evidence for operational teams.
workflow_title: From identity checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY collects and normalizes identity provider outputs then applies internal rules to route, review, create cases and preserve audit evidence in compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented outputs. One normalized layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects and normalizes identity provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and evidence to enable clearer operational control and audit-ready compliance for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance operations requiring normalized identity data, audit-ready evidence and scalable deployment within governed, multi-provider workflows and bank due diligence processes.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY normalize identity provider outputs for compliance
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how normalized identity data supports case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved from identity checks
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration methods for onboarding identity verification
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer, connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY normalize identity provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates and normalizes identity provider outputs by applying internal policies and routing checks into connected review cases and decisions within one operational compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and clear traceability of compliance decisions and workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers without replacing them, layering orchestration and workflow controls over current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our identity verification providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace identity verification providers but connects their results into one normalized, auditable compliance workflow for efficient review and decision-making.
final_title: Connect identity outputs into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY normalizes identity provider data into connected workflows supporting onboarding, case management and compliance evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
